candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred than explicit total line.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred for CHE.
Also a direct match, but the simpler primary balance-sheet line is preferred first.
Includes short-term investments, broader than pure cash equivalents.
Broader than pure cash equivalents because it includes short-term investments.

variables.notes: Priority given to pure cash-equivalents labels over cash-plus-investments labels.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred than explicit total line.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean reported total for current debt/current maturities; best fit for STD.
Component of short-term debt only; would miss current portion of long-term debt if used alone.
Current maturities component only; not sufficient when a clean total current debt line exists.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Useful non-lease component, but incomplete without short-term debt; candidate outside shortlist.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Did not use the broader total 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' because it includes lease current portion in this dataset ('Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases' plus 'Capitalized Leases - Current Portion'). Selected the minimal non-lease components instead.

candidates.why: Direct match for current taxes payable.
Includes long-term and short-term taxes, so broader than desired current taxes payable.

variables.notes: Confident choice even though not in candidate shortlist.

candidates.why: Direct total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Also a total net PPE variant, but secondary to the cleaner standard total label.
Gross PPE exists, but net total is preferred.
Only a component, not total PPE.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Not total assets; only another assets line.
Component of assets, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Total - Net
candidates.why: Component of assets, not total assets.

variables.notes: Used the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net operating cash flow; preferred for OANCF.
Section/header style line without reported values; not the net cash flow amount.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash flow from operating activities line.
